description: Installs Docker Desktop via Chocolatey with WSL2 backend support.

messages.dockerNotFound: Docker not found, installing Docker Desktop via Chocolatey...
messages.wsl2NotEnabled: WSL2 is not enabled. Docker Desktop requires WSL2. Enable it via: wsl --install
messages.daemonNotRunning: Docker daemon is not running. Start Docker Desktop manually after reboot.
messages.scriptDisabled: Docker installation is disabled in config.
messages.rebootRequired: A reboot may be required for Docker Desktop to function. Please restart if prompted.
messages.uninstallFailed: Docker Desktop uninstall failed -- may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Docker removed, tracking purged.

commands.all: Install Docker Desktop + verify daemon + PATH setup (default)
commands.status: Check Docker daemon and version status
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
